blended.narrative: Camp Fortune is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 8 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 6,366 ft. Looking ahead, 23 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 5" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
